# hetzner-robot_storagebox_subaccount (Resource)

Manages a subaccount of a Storage Box.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a subaccount on a Storage Box.
resource "hetzner-robot_storagebox_subaccount" "ci" {
  storagebox_id = 123456
  homedirectory = "/ci-backups"
  ssh           = true
  readonly      = false
  comment       = "CI backup writer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `homedirectory` (String) Home directory of the subaccount
- `storagebox_id` (Number) Storage Box ID

### Optional

- `comment` (String)
- `external_reachability` (Boolean)
- `readonly` (Boolean)
- `samba` (Boolean)
- `ssh` (Boolean)
- `webdav` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password generated on creation
- `server` (String)
- `username` (String) Username assigned by Hetzner
